description.unified: Deals Physical Damage to enemies in a straight line ahead, stunning them for [3 sec->1.8 sec]. Deals additional Physical Damage to non-hero enemies. [Experiment Successful!]: No cooldown is incurred.

Deals Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting them with [Explosive Material] for [10 sec->7 sec], which increases Physical Damage taken by [20%->25%] and blinds them for [4 sec->2.4 sec]. [Experiment Successful!]: Removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.

Attaches a sticky bomb to a random enemy. After 3 sec, the bomb explodes, dealing Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies and stunning them for [3 sec->1.8 sec]. Enemies with [Explosive Material] take additional Physical Damage. [Experiment Successful!]: The bomb explodes immediately upon attaching, triggering its effects.

On Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to fire a shell that deals Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies, stunning them for [2 sec->1.2 sec]. At the end of each skill, attempts an [Experiment]. There is a 50% chance for success, which empowers the next skill. Empowered skills do not attempt an [Experiment].

dark.unified: Increases the duration of Blind by [2 sec->1.2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], and the number of bomb placements is changed to 2.
Shell activation chance is increased by 10%, and stun duration is increased by [1 sec->0.6 sec].

description.unified: [Rapid Fire] Increases DMG by 50%, and recovers {0} Mana upon a Critical Hit.
[Smoke Bomb] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases the duration of Blind by {0} sec.
[Glue Bomb] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces the Heal Rate of the hit target by {0}% for 7 sec.

dark.unified: On [Experiment] success, increases Attack Speed by [300->300%] and Status Ailment Accuracy by [(added) 300] for 10 sec.

description.unified: [Experiment] success chance is increased by {0}%. On [Experiment] success, Attack increases by {1}%, Attack Speed by {2}[->%], and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by {3}%. This effect stacks up to 4 times and cannot be dispelled.
